title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama (PyPI)
summary: LangChain adapter that plugs Ollama models into LangChain LLM, chat, and embeddings chains.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for any Ollama model; runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j – Java client for Ollama
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints with fluent builders.

title: ollama-rb – Ruby gem
summary: Community Ruby gem that exposes Ollama chat, generate, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight Node CLI wrapper around ollama-js to chat, list, and pull models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: VS Code extension that adds local AI autocomplete powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-streamlit – Chat Playground
summary: Streamlit chat playground that lets you switch Ollama models and tweak generation parameters live.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, WebUI, and optional NVIDIA runtime.

title: ollama-haystack – Haystack integration
summary: Haystack (deepset) nodes that use Ollama models for prompt, chat, and embeddings pipelines.

title: ollama-rag – Minimal RAG example
summary: Tiny Python repo showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings + Llama-2 chat.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers users via any Ollama model; supports slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node that integrates Ollama chat and generate operations into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-elixir – Elixir client
summary: Community Elixir wrapper around Ollama REST API with GenServer-backed process pools.

title: ollama-dagger – CI/CD pipelines
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service containers for integration tests in CI.

title: ollama-rust – Rust client crate
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama with Serde types and tokio-based streaming.

title: ollama-csharp – .NET client
summary: Community C# library for .NET 6+ that wraps Ollama endpoints with HttpClient and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.
